inputs.text: Mujhe bukhar aa rahi hai, bahut tezi se badh rahi hai, aur sir mein bahut dard ho raha hai

hypotheses.label: Chikungunya

hypotheses.label: Viral fever

inputs.text: Aankhon ke peeche dard ho raha hai, haddiyan toot rahi hain, aur bukhar abhi bhi hai

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: Retro-orbital pain and bone pain are characteristic of Dengue fever

hypotheses.label: Chikungunya
hypotheses.rationale: While joint pain is common in Chikungunya, the specific symptoms here lean more towards Dengue

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Viral fevers can present with a variety of symptoms, but the specific combination here is less typical

inputs.text: Bukhar kam ho rahi hai, lekin lal daane nikal rahe hain, aur masoodon se khoon aa raha hai

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: The appearance of rash and bleeding gums along with the previous symptoms strongly suggests Dengue fever

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: While some viral fevers can cause rash, the specific combination of symptoms here is more indicative of Dengue

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Malaria typically presents with cyclic fever and other distinct symptoms not seen here

inputs.text: Bahut kamzori mehsoos ho rahi hai, aur haalat bigra raha hai

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: The progression of symptoms and presence of hemorrhagic signs confirm the diagnosis of Dengue fever

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to the specific symptoms and signs of Dengue fever

hypotheses.label: Malaria
